title: avenula pratensis subsp. iberica
intro: Avenula pratensis subsp. iberica, also known as Iberian meadow grass or Iberian oat-grass, is a subspecies of grass belonging to the genus Avenula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are believed to help soothe digestive issues and reduce stress levels. The health benefits of Avenula pratensis subsp. iberica include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
